name: Pistachio-Lime Chicken Linguine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken breast half into 1/2-inch strips.
2. In a large frying pan, melt 2 tablespoons butter and olive oil over medium heat until the butter foams.
3. Add garlic and cook until soft, being careful not to brown it.
4. Remove garlic from the pan.
5. Add chicken and cook for about 10 minutes or until fork tender. Remove chicken and keep warm.
6. Add pistachio nuts to the pan and stir until lightly toasted.
7. Stir in lime juice and black pepper.
8. Return chicken to the pan and stir to coat with the pistachio mixture.
9. Toss remaining 2 tablespoons butter with cooked linguine. Place on a serving dish and top with the chicken mixture.
10. Sprinkle with grated lime zest.
Amount Per Serving
Calories: 852 (290 calories from fat)
Fat: 34%
Protein: 22%
Carbohydrates: 44%
